_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the per-domain source files; CI regenerates this file.

content.markdown:
# Notification

Notifications inform users of updates, background task completions, or events that require their attention. Individual notification items appear in the notification panel.

***

## When to use

* To inform users of completed background tasks.

* To surface updates or system events that require the user's attention.

* Do not use for actions requiring immediate input. Use a [modal](modal) instead.

## Style

* Use direct, concise language. One to two sentences.

* Include a timestamp.

* Include a link or action if the user must respond.

## Do / Don't

| Do                                                            | Don't                        |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| Export complete - Your file is ready to download.             | You have a new notification. |
| Connection error - The Snowflake connection failed. Reconnect | Something happened.          |

content.prose: Notifications inform users of updates, background task completions, or events that require their attention. Individual notification items appear in the notification panel.
